prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Alzheimer's Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.4 kg; Height 166.6 cm; BMI 28.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 227mg/dL; 9 months ago 185mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.7kg; 9 months ago 76.9kg; 6 months ago 77.9kg; 3 months ago 76.8kg; current 79.4kg), Height (12 months ago 166.6cm; 9 months ago 166.6cm; 6 months ago 166.6cm; 3 months ago 166.6cm; current 166.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 453mg/g; 9 months ago 627mg/g; 6 months ago 614mg/g; 3 months ago 597mg/g; current 545mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 104mg/dL; 9 months ago 109mg/dL; 6 months ago 127mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
